objectives.label: What they work on day-to-day
objectives.description: Understand their actual daily work, not just their job title. Need 2-3 specific details about what they do.

objectives.label: Their daily tasks and responsibilities
objectives.description: Specific tasks they do regularly - meetings, reports, tools they use daily.

objectives.label: AI tools they've tried
objectives.description: Which AI tools they've personally used and for what. ChatGPT, Claude, Copilot, etc.

objectives.label: Their core skills
objectives.description: Skills they consider their strengths - technical, interpersonal, domain expertise.

objectives.label: What they want to learn
objectives.description: What they're curious about or want to get better at with AI.

objectives.label: Goals for the 12 weeks
objectives.description: What they want to achieve during the AI Tuesdays program.

objectives.label: Starting points for AI Tuesdays
objectives.description: Identify 2-3 specific, actionable activities they could work on in their first AI Tuesday sessions, based on their role and goals.
